response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (17% below threshold) conflicts with our policy floor (55% minimum); our own marginal state (42%) and islanded condition preclude outbound sharing—prioritizing grid reconnection and load management to restore system resilience.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Islanded with marginal SoC (42%); both peers rejecting due to their own criticality and trust concerns. r1c5 has flagged r0c5 as distrusted due to correlated drain. Will resume balanced sharing only after SoC recovery above 60% and explicit trust re-establishment from r1c5..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
